case_title: REGINALD OLIVER VS. MASTER COVERENTERPRISES INC.,

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-23-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MASTER COVERENTERPRISES INC., DBA NICE & RIGHT FURNITURE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT MASTER COVERENTERPRISES INC., DBA NICE & RIGHT FURNITURE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-18-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-18-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF REGINALD OLIVER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MASTER COVERENTERPRISES INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY JACKIE CHAN, PRESIDENT. MR. CHAN IS ASSISTED WITH CANTONSE INTERPRETATION BY TUNG LY. MR. LY WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETER OATH. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY OLIVER, REGINALD AS TO DEFENDANT MASTER COVERENTERPRISES INC., DBA NICE & RIGHT FURNITURE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-18-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OLIVER, REGINALD ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
CORRESPONDENCE LETTER ADDRESSED "TO WHOM IT MAY CONCERN" LODGED IN FILE RECEIVED BY DEFENDANT MASTER COVERENTERPRISES INC., DBA NICE & RIGHT FURNITURE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-18-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OLIVER, REGINALD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MASTER COVERENTERPRISES INC., DBA NICE & RIGHT FURNITURE THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED DOES NOT SUPPORT THAT PLAINTIFF'S INJURIES (IF ANY) WERE CAUSED BY ANY ACT, OMISSION, OR PRODUCT SOLD TO PLAINTIFF BY DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
